no-restricted-syntax.message: withSpring is not part of the approved animation system. Use the approved animation primitives instead.
springify is not part of the approved animation system. Use the approved animation primitives instead.

patterns.message: Mobile must not import persistence internals directly. Use RPC or domain-facing abstractions instead.
Mobile must not import server-side services directly. Use transport-safe abstractions instead.
expo-blur is not part of the approved mobile design system. Use the approved blur/overlay primitives instead.
LinearGradient is not part of the approved mobile design system. Use flat color backgrounds instead.
